mapper.select: select t1.training_nm , t1.orgn_id , t3.orgn_nm , t2.* , t2.action_dt || CASE when t2.use_yn = 'N' then ' - (미사용)' else '' END AS titleActionDt from esg.tb_emergency_response_training t1 left join esg.tb_emergency_response_training_result t2 on t1.write_year = t2.write_year and t1.doc_type = t2.doc_type and t1.doc_no = t2.doc_no and t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info t3 on t1.orgn_id = t3.orgn_id and t1.comp_id = t3.comp_id where t2.write_year = #{writeYear} and t2.doc_type = #{docType} and t2.doc_no = #{docNo} and t2.comp_id = #{compId} order by t2.use_yn desc, t2.action_dt desc

select t1.write_year , t1.doc_type , t1.doc_no , t1.training_nm , t1.orgn_id , t2.orgn_nm , sum( t3.target_time ) as target_time from esg.tb_emergency_response_training t1 left join esg.tb_orgn_info t2 on t1.orgn_id = t2.orgn_id and t1.comp_id = t2.comp_id left join esg.tb_emergency_response_training_scenario t3 on t1.write_year = t3.write_year and t1.doc_type = t3.doc_type and t1.doc_no = t3.doc_no and t1.comp_id = t3.comp_id left join esg.tb_approval_info a on a.target_type = t1.doc_type and a.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no and a.param = 'writer' left join esg.tb_approval_info b on b.target_type = t1.doc_type and b.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no and b.param = 'reviewer' left join esg.tb_approval_info c on c.target_type = t1.doc_type and c.target_id = t1.write_year||t1.doc_no and c.param = 'approver' where t1.comp_id = #{compId} and a.signature is not null and b.signature is not null and t1.use_yn = 'Y' and t1.write_year = #{writeYear} group by t1.write_year, t1.doc_type, t1.doc_no, t1.training_nm, t1.orgn_id, t2.orgn_nm
mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docSeq from esg.tb_emergency_response_training_result where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
insert into esg.tb_emergency_response_training_result ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, action_dt, comp_id, action_nm, action_location, action_content, action_result, target_time, measurement_time, observation_actual_behavior, remark, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) values( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{actionDt}, #{compId}, #{actionNm}, #{actionLocation}, #{actionContent}, #{actionResult}, #{targetTime}, #{measurementTime}, #{observationActualBehavior}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select:
select t2.write_year , t2.doc_type , t2.doc_no , t2.doc_seq from esg.tb_emergency_response_training t1 left join esg.tb_emergency_response_training_result t2 on t1.write_year = t2.write_year and t1.doc_type = t2.doc_type and t1.doc_no = t2.doc_no where t1.write_year = #{writeYear} and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y'
and cast(substring(t2.action_dt from 5 for 2) AS integer) between 1 and 6; -- 상반기
and cast(substring(t2.action_dt from 5 for 2) AS integer) between 7 and 12; -- 하반기
